creator: gurdiga@gmail.com
text:
The URL given in port description
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/url.cgi?ports/deskutils/kchm/pkg-descr)
for the port homepage:
http://kchmnew.sourceforge.net/ leads to an empty directory listing.
I thought this is a mistake that should be fixed.

Fix: 

Change the homepage link http://kchmnew.sourceforge.net/ to http://sourceforge.net/projects/kchmnew/
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/deskutils/kchm
cat pkg-descr
